title: Tao Te Ching 47
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 47 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 47 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Without going out of your door, you can know the ways of the world. Without looking through your window, you can see the way of heaven.
